en_definition: connected with your emotions, rather than reason
a piece of special flat glass that reflects images, so that you can see yourself when you look in it
a type of music with strong rhythms, in which the players often make up the music as they are playing

hesitating before doing something because you do not want to do it or because you are not sure that it is the right thing to do
belonging to a very simple society with no industry, etc.
lasting for a long time or for all time in the future
something that you own or have with you
the state of having or owning something
slightly angry
disagreement or a lack of friendship among people who have different opinions about something
lasting only for a short time, not permanent
to refuse to accept something and try to stop it from happening
a large number or amount of somebody / something
a feeling of responsibility or worry that is difficult to deal with
something that is being carried (usually in large amounts) by a person, vehicle, etc.
the fact that something is used or accepted by a lot of people
the system of money that a country uses
if somebody / something has a particular tendency, they are likely to behave or act in a particular way
different from what is usual or expected, especially in a way that is worrying, harmful or not wanted
zh_definition: 不正常的；反常的；变态的；畸形的

en_definition: involving risk or danger, especially to somebody's health or safety
a small bag made of leather, plastic, etc. for carrying coins and often also paper money, cards, etc., used especially by women
zh_definition: 钱包，皮夹子（尤指女用的）

en_definition: an official document that shows that permission has been given to do, own or use something
a clear precious stone of pure carbon, the hardest substance known
a person whose job is to deal with people arriving at or telephoning a hotel, an office building, a doctor's surgery, etc.
a feeling of fear
a large sea fish with sharp teeth and a pointed fin on its back
an infectious disease like a very bad cold, that causes fever, pains and weakness
a living thing, too small to be seen without a microscope, that causes infectious disease in people, animals and plants
the dried leaves of the tobacco plant that are used for making cigarettes, smoking in a pipe or chewing
to surprise somebody very much
zh_definition: 使十分惊讶；使大为惊奇

en_definition: a standard or principle by which something is judged, or with the help of which a decision is made
zh_definition: 评判或作决定的标准，准则，原则

en_definition: a covering for part or all of the face, worn to hide or protect it
to give a document, proposal, etc. to somebody in authority so that they can study or consider it
the raised flat area beside the track at a train station where passengers get on or off the train
to put something somewhere quickly, quietly and easily
zh_definition: 迅速放置；悄悄塞；偷偷放

en_definition: a cardboard or plastic cover for holding loose papers, etc.
the first letter of a person's name
happening at the beginning; first
feeling ashamed because you have done something that you know is wrong or have not done something that you should have done

en_definition: the underground railway system in London
the act of showing something, for example works of art, to the public
a room or building for showing works of art, especially to the public
zh_definition: （艺术作品）陈列室，展览馆；画廊

en_definition: a period of time when somebody / something has to wait because of a problem that makes something slow or late
zh_definition: 延迟（或耽搁、拖延）的时间

en_definition: a person who makes a formal request for something (= applies for it), especially for a job, a place at a college or a university, etc.
zh_definition: 申请人（尤指求职、进高等院校等）

en_definition: (of rain) fall heavily
a small computer that can work with a battery and be easily carried
zh_definition: 便携式电脑；笔记本电脑

en_definition: the act of lending something; the state of being lent

rare and worth a lot of money
a container made of glass, etc., used for holding cut flowers or as a decorative object
the process of comparing two or more people or things
connected with the state, government or public affairs
an aspect, or way of looking at or thinking about something
a measurement in space, for example the height, width or length of something
connected with or belonging to a country that controls another country
a building that has special historical importance
zh_definition: 历史遗迹；有历史价值的建筑

en_definition: to discuss something, especially formally, before making a decision or finding a solution
a member of an army, especially one who is not an officer
failure to win or to be successful
likely not to be affected or harmed by something
extremely important because a future situation will be affected by it
zh_definition: 极重要的；关键的；至关紧要的

en_definition: continuing to exist or develop
zh_definition: 仍在进行的；持续存在的

en_definition: involving two or more people together
in the end; finally

to throw away; to remove; to be free of
